The build log

While packaging the files /usr/ports/devel/pycharm-ce/work/stage/usr/local/share/pycharm-ce/lib/delight-nashorn-sandbox-0.1.16.jar and /usr/ports/devel/pycharm-ce/work/stage/usr/local/share/pycharm-ce/lib/proxy-vole-1.0.5.jar are expected but not found. Please have a look at the attached build log for further details.
